title: ClientInstanceDetachment v1
description: Machine-readable schema for a pod-layer artifact that detaches a concrete client instance from a serving-node session using the same participant-over-channel boundary as `client-instance-attachment.v1`.

detachment/id.description: Stable identifier of this client-instance detachment artifact.

detached-at.description: Timestamp when the client instance was detached or invalidated.

attachment/id.description: Reference to the earlier attachment artifact being terminated.

serving-node/id.description: Serving node that hosted the attached client session.

client-instance/id.description: Concrete client, device, or install instance being detached.

detach/reason.description: Coarse detachment reason. It is intentionally bounded and does not require disclosure of detailed operational internals.

detach/notes.description: Optional operator- or client-facing note describing the detachment in more detail.

participant-bind.description: Participant-scoped bind reused to prove whose session context is being detached.

proof/node-attestation.description: Optional future-facing serving-node attestation over the detachment artifact.

policy_annotations.description: Optional local or federation policy annotations that do not change the core detachment semantics.
